$comment: SHA-256 + code-point count + section-tag count of the RAW Cowork system-prompt constant (the module-scope backtick-template string consumed once as system_prompts.cowork_system_prompt.value.prompt) extracted from each Claude Desktop app.asar. Purpose: let a maintainer detect prompt-append DRIFT across Desktop releases WITHOUT publishing the proprietary verbatim text — the committed baselines/prompts/desktop-*/system-prompt-append.md are deliberately PARAPHRASED under the repo's no-bundling rule. This is prompt-SPECIFIC and complements provenance.asarFingerprint in baselines/desktop-*.json, which is a coarse 16-char hash over broad cowork slices and flips on any nearby churn (e.g. a minifier rename), not only on prompt content.
extractionMethod: In the Desktop app.asar bundle, find the single consumption site `cowork_system_prompt:{value:{prompt:<id>}` and read the minified constant <id> (name is minifier-assigned and varies per build). Take the backtick-template body of `<id>=`...`` (raw template SOURCE — ${} placeholders and \-escapes left intact, so the hash is minifier-name-independent) and SHA-256 its UTF-8 bytes. codePoints = [...utf8].length; sectionTags = count of /<([a-z_]+)>/g opens.
localRawRetention: The verbatim raw is retained locally (NEVER committed) under ~/cowork-agent-backup/desktop-asar/<ver>/cowork-system-prompt-raw.txt, alongside a full app.asar backup — see the Desktop-asar backup ritual in the private CLAUDE.md.

1.18286.0.note: Recorded before this fingerprint file existed; the 1.18286.0 asar was pruned by the Desktop self-update before a hash could be captured, and old Desktop versions are not re-downloadable. codePoints + sectionTags are from the reconstruction (docs/internal). Presumed byte-identical to 1.18286.2 on the strength of an exact code-point + section-tag-structure match.

1.18286.2.note: First release with a retained raw + hash anchor. Prompt append verified UNCHANGED vs 1.18286.0 (identical 37857 code points and identical 43-tag section structure/order); the reconstructed 1.18286.0 paraphrase baseline remains faithful for 1.18286.2.

1.19367.0.note: Back-filled 2026-07-10 from the retained asar backup. Prompt append BYTE-IDENTICAL to 1.18286.2 (same SHA-256, same 37857 code points / 43 tags); only the minifier-assigned constant id changed (sIi -> JDr). The 1.18286.0 paraphrase baseline remains faithful.

1.20186.0.note: Prompt CHANGED vs 1.19367.0: +18 code points, purely additive (37933-byte prefix identical; trailing bytes = '\n{{modelIdentity}}' appended after </env>), section-tag structure unchanged (43 opens / 40 unique names). The {{modelIdentity}} placeholder is DEPLOYMENT-GATED: rendered only for custom-3p/enterprise deployments; on the first-party Cowork the harness emulates (deployment class type='1p', rendererConfig()=null) the renderer takes the strip branch (/\n?\{\{modelIdentity\}\}/g -> '') so the RENDERED prompt is byte-identical to pre-1.20186.0. The 1.18286.0 paraphrase baseline therefore remains faithful (no new paraphrase dir / renderer change). placeholders + sectionTagNames are consumed by the sync-time prompt-inventory drift-diff.

subagentAppendMethod: Independent of the single-text `versions` fingerprints above: the sub-agent environment append is a TWO-BRANCH generator selected on hostLoopMode. In the SINGLE bundle module that references buildSubagentEnvironmentPrompt AND contains both branch discriminators, slice each branch's raw backtick-template body by scanning outward from its discriminator fragment (escaped backticks are decoded to bare backticks; other escapes left intact); normalize every ${...} interpolation to the literal token ${} ; sha256 the UTF-8 bytes; keep the first 16 hex chars. The hl (host-loop) branch is discriminated by the fragment 'on the user's machine' (anchored to the occurrence immediately preceding the vm branch, since the phrase also occurs in unrelated prose), the vm (sandbox) branch by 'exist only in the sandbox'. BOTH fingerprints are mandatory per version entry. Consumed by checkSubagentPromptFacts in src/sync/cowork-sync.ts; re-derive with readMainBundleFiles + extractSubagentBranchSlices + subagentBranchFingerprint (see docs/maintenance.md). Raw texts retained locally only (see localRawRetention).

1.20186.1.note: Branch template texts byte-identical across 1.20186.0 and 1.20186.1 (both derive hl=8fe5583c5996776a, vm=859aa136fc15b38f). The named buildSubagentEnvironmentPrompt generator with these branch bodies is present from 1.20186.0; earlier retained releases (<=1.19367.0) used a differently-structured generator not covered by this fingerprint. Only the newest entry is compared, so one entry covers the current verified family.
